name: Chibiusa
description: Chibiusa's real name is actually Usagi, but she is nicknamed Chibiusa to distinguish her from Usagi. She is usually very upbeat, extroverted and outgoing. Though she started out socially awkward, she quickly became popular with her classmates in the 20th-century. Chibiusa's dream is to one day become a real lady, to have her own prince, and to be friends with everyone she knows. Meanwhile, she is a fairly ordinary little girl; she likes pink and red, pudding, pancakes, and rabbits. Her favorite

name: Guel Jeturk
description: An heir to Jeturk Heavy Machinery, one of the group's three branches, and a third-year student in the piloting department. Guel has a rough temperament and is quick to anger. As the ace pilot of Jeturk House, he has absolute confidence in his own skills. (Source: Official Website)

name: Kakeru Kurahara
description: Height: 172 cm (5'8) Kakeru has short, straight black hair and slate-colored eyes. When he runs, the wind pushes his hair to the back. He has a lean and athletic build that was developed over the years of competitive running. He often maintains a serious expression and he is usually seen wearing his sky blue sports jacket and gray sweatpants. name: Aries Spring
nativeName: アリエス・スプリング
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'4") __Hometown:__ Rosapop District Aries is a very cheerful, optimistic, and spacey girl. According to her friends, she is also careless and can't take a hint. She is also a very grateful person that would repeatedly thank someone who helps her. ~!Although she is a bit spacey, she actually has photographic memory.!~ ~!In the end, she marries Kanata.!~

name: Balsa Yonsa
description: A skilled warrior from the faraway land Kanbal. Balsa wields her spear in order to save lives in atonement for the life that was spent on saving her, although she claims to be a simple hired bodyguard. She is around thirty. Balsa is pragmatic and intelligent, and does not hold much regard for class distinction customs.

name: Chiyo
description: **Height:** 168 cm A mysterious, kind and cheerful girl that Yuu accidentally summoned. She grants Yuu the wish of becoming his elder sister. As Chiyo herself states she has been revered as a goddess, demon and monster during her existence but only Yuu has mistaken her for an angel.

name: Hisui

name: Akira Kogami
description: Akira is a junior high school student who is also the captain of the Lucky ☆ Star informational ad section called "Lucky Channel" in the Comptiq magazine. Akira's appearance is as follows: she has short salmon pink hair, she has an ahoge towards the right side of her head, and has golden yellow eyes. name: Finn Ames
description: __Height:__ 170 cm Finn Ames is a first-year student at Easton Magic Academy and member of Adler dorm. He is the younger brother of [Rayne Ames](https://anilist.co/character/202422). Finn is Mash's roommate and his first and best friend.

name: Gaoshun
description: Gaoshun is Jinshi's attendant. He's shown to be extremely dependable. A stern believer in deference to authority and proper etiquette, his disapproval is often splattered in his transparent facial expressions, even if he says nothing.

name: Sofia Velmer
nativeName: ソフィア・ヴェルマー（バルメ）
description: An ex-mechanized jäger major of the Finnish Rapid Deployment Force who is skilled with knives. She is in love with Koko, but it is unknown whether Koko returns her feelings. Her real name is Sofia Velmer. Valmet comes from a military family and served as a UN peacekeeping officer in Africa. Her entire Finnish-led UN squad was annihilated by Chen Guoming and she herself lost an eye in that attack. Since then Valmet feels uneasy and even frightened whenever she sets foot on African soil. name: Kirin Toudou
description: Kirin is the top-ranking student of Seidoukan Academy. She is a shy and quiet girl who becomes the academy's top student as a 13 year-old and has not lost to anyone until Ayato challenges her a second time. She does not have a personal lux but rather carries a katana (Senbakiri) around as a weapon which often makes her greatly marveled by others as she tops the former No. 1 spot just by using a katana.

name: Regulus Corneas
nativeName: レグルス・コルニアス
description: Regulus is a young man of a medium height. He has gold eyes, white hair and a middle to skinny build. Regulus Is a part of the Sin Archbishops of the Witch Cult and represents greed. Regulus is known for being very talkative and calls himself unselfish, while in fact he is very prideful and likes to act above others and reference himself as above others.
